signing.c(3) Library Functions Manual signing.c(3)

NAME

signing.c - GPG signing operations implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int gpg_sign_with_key (const char *key_id, const uint8_t *message, size_t message_len, uint8_t *signature_out, size_t *signature_len_out)
Sign a message using GPG key (via gpg --detach-sign). int gpg_sign_detached_ed25519 (const char *key_id, const uint8_t *message, size_t message_len, uint8_t signature_out[64])
Sign message with GPG and extract raw Ed25519 signature.

Detailed Description

GPG signing operations implementation.
